title: U.S. Says Iran May Swap Ideology For Investment. History Shows Otherwise
summary_full: Senior U.S. officials have said Iran would be richly rewarded for changing its stance on the United States. Iran’s leaders have rejected such a bargain in the past.
summary_public: Senior U.S. officials have said Iran would be richly rewarded for changing its stance on the United States. Iran’s leaders have rejected such a bargain in the past.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran’s leaders have rejected such a bargain
